text:
On 31.03.2009 19:54 Uhr, Stephen Montgomery-Smith wrote:
 > Florian - I must admit that I haven't looked at this port for a very
 > long time. Would you be interested in taking over the maintainership?
 >
 > If you don't want to do it, then I will definitely go ahead and test
 > your changes. But if you do want to take it over, that would be great.
 >
 >
 
 Hi,
 
 yes i can take over the maintainership.
 
 Cheers,
 Florian
